basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Project Technical Support II Notification 2026 has been released on 18 May 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support II Recruitment 2026. Candidates up to 30 years of age who have completed 12th in Science with Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering or equivalent) and relevant experience OR a three-year Graduate degree in relevant subject with two years’ experience are eligible to apply for these Project Technical Support II vacancies. The online appli

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age Relaxation: Relaxation as per AIIMS/ICMR rules.

qualification.details: 12th in science + Diploma (MLT/DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years Experience in relevant subject / field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject

salary_details.details: Rs. 20000 Per Month + HRA, as admissible

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 26-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-II recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Technical Support-II position at AIIMS Delhi is 26th May 2026. Ensure all details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed 12th grade in science with a Diploma in MLT/DMLT or Engineering (or equivalent) and five years of relevant experience. Alternatively, a three-year graduate degree in a relevant field with two years of experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Technical Support-II position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Project Technical Support-II role is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per AIIMS and ICMR rules.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Technical Support-II post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 20,000, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA) as admissible according to AIIMS rules.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for this position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Technical Support-II position will primarily involve an interview, which may be conducted either offline or online, depending on the institute's arrangements.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job? Is it a permanent or contract position?
faq.answer: The job is offered on a contract basis. This means the employment will be for a fixed tenure as per the terms and conditions of the project.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the job location for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi, located in New Delhi. Therefore, the job location will be in Delhi.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the AIIMS Delhi Project Technical Support-II recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online by the last date. You can use the direct apply online link provided in the 'Important Links' section or visit the official AIIMS Delhi website to fill out the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are generally required for the application process?
faq.answer: While specific requirements are in the notification, typically candidates need to upload their photograph, signature, and relevant educational and experience certificates in the prescribed format during the online application.
